title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.110 - Boards to make rules for own government
text:
174.110.  Boards to make rules for own government. — Each board shall have power to make such rules, regulations and bylaws as may be deemed necessary for the government of the officers of the board and to secure their accountability.
(RSMo 1939 § 10761) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9604; 1919 § 11499; 1909 § 11072
